word: H4768 - מַרְבִּית - marbîyth - mar-beeth' - Greatest part

sections.paragraph:
Original: מרבּית

Transliteration: marbı̂yth

Phonetic: mar-beeth'

BDB Definition:

  1. increase, great number, multitude, greatness
    1. increase
      1. of family
      2. increment, interest, usury
    2. great number (of people)
    3. greatness (of wisdom)

Origin: from H7235

TWOT entry: 2103d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
